title: Amtech W4150 60mm Disc Padlock, Heavy Duty and Corrosion Resistant Stainless Steel Construction with 2 Keys
features: DURABLE: This heavy duty 60mm stainless steel disc padlock has a strong brass barrel with an 8mm hardened steel shackle
VERSATILE: Supplied with 2 keys, it is ideal for securing sheds, gates, garages, chains and other outdoor security applications
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for shrubs, flowers, and soft plant stems
GARDEN ESSENTIAL: A must-have for all types of garden maintenance
LOCKING MECHANISM: Safety lock ensures secure storage after use
description: Product Description The Amtech disc padlock is constructed using a stainless-steel shell and durable brass barrel for reliable security. It is also corrosion resistant and therefore ideal for both indoor and outdoor usage on gates and chains, as well as sheds and other applications. Supplied with 2 keys as standard. Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your household and security requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Do not forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 60mm Disc Padlock See more
